title: Camping Gear Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Camping Gear Donation Programs 17 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a store of used and new items including clothing, appliances, household and kitchen items, electronics, books, and linens. Offers vouchers to use at the thrift store for clothing and household goods to anyone in need. Also accepts donations. 705 First Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing and household goods vouchers: Unrestricted; once every 30 days Hours: Thrift Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Email (541) 791-5139 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JOIN JOIN DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of food, blankets, sleeping bags, tarps, camping equipment, socks, underwear, hats, gloves, jackets, and hygiene items (shampoo, conditioner, razors, deodorant, feminine products, etc.) 1435 NE 81st Avenue Suite 100 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday/Saturday/Sunday 9am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm. Closed on national holidays. Email (971) 710-5768 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH FALLS FIRST UNITED METHODIST CHURCH FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a food pantry that has non-perishable items. Blankets and sleeping bags are available to those in need, depending on donations received. Food donations such as peanut butter, canned meat, cereal, and powdered milk are accepted. 230 N 10th Street Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon Email (541) 884-4053 Get Directions Visit Website More Details P:EAR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center that offers arts and music, mentoring, educational, and outdoor recreational programs. Additional supportive services include bus tickets, haircuts, clothing, and support for pregnancy and parenting. Also offers meals and cooking classes. Accepts donations of food, clothing, and camping gear. 338 NW 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Ages 15-24 experiencing homelessness Hours: Tuesday-Friday: 9am-2pm Breakfast at 9am and lunch at noon to those served by p:ear Donations: Monday-Friday 8am-3pm Email (503) 228-6677 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RIGHT 2 DREAM TOO DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of camping gear (tents and sleeping bags), clothing (socks, underwear, shoes, men’s and women’s apparel), bedding (pillows and blankets), toiletries (soap, shampoo, conditioner, toothbrushes, toothpaste, deodorant, body wipes), food (cooked or uncooked), and operational supplies (55-gallon trash bags, paper plates, plastic cutlery). Cash or check donations can be made onsite to support utility and material needs; receipts are available at the front desk. Financial donations may also be mailed to the registered office or made online. Also advocates for policies addressing homelessness and offers volunteer opportunities. 999 N Thunderbird Way Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 8am-10pm Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells household goods, books, furniture, toys, clothing, shoes, jewelry, electronics, and various accessories to raise money to benefit animal welfare programs. Donations accepted. 1169 Redwood Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-4pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Email (541) 955-3367 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER CLACKAMAS COUNTY THE FATHER'S HEART STREET MINISTRY DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of socks, gloves, tents, sleeping bags, blankets, coats, and men's jeans. 603 12th Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-2pm or any time the shelter is open Email (503) 722-9780 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER CLATSOP COUNTY LIFEBOAT SERVICES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of men's clothing, shoes, blankets (size double and under only), sleeping bands, and tents. 1040 Commercial Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donations: By appointment only Office hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 741-3572 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER JACKSON COUNTY ASHLAND EMERGENCY WINTER SHELTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of clothing, personal hygiene items, shelf stable food, pet food, bedding and linen, camping gear and tents, and monetary. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 9am-2pm Email (541) 631-2235 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LANE COUNTY COMMUNITY SHARING WARMING SHELTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts winter weather donations of Socks, gloves, jackets, blankets, tents, tarps, etc. 1440 Birch Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 942-2176 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LANE COUNTY FIRST CHRISTIAN CHURCH HELPING HEARTS ROOM DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of clothing, light blankets and bedding items, sleeping bags, tarps, tents, and personal hygiene items. Volunteer opportunities are also available. 1166 Oak Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm (541) 344-1425 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER MULTNOMAH COUNTY MULTNOMAH COUNTY HELP FOR WHEN IT'S COLD WEBSITE DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about where to donate winter gear. Items needed vary by shelter. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER UMATILLA COUNTY NEIGHBOR 2 NEIGHBOR PENDLETON WARMING STATION DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepting donations of sleeping bags, gloves, backpacks, and thermal underwear. 715 SE Court Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Open 7 days per week 6:30pm-8pm, Friday, November 15, 2024-Saturday, March 15, 2025 when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below Email (765) 791-8332 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER UNION COUNTY RIGHT TRACK RESOURCE CENTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of socks, gloves, hand warmers, shampoo, and conditioner. There is a donation bin in front of the facility. 501 3rd Street La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week Saturday, November 15, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 (541) 910-3056 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES LOW-BARRIER SHELTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community shelter, community meals, showers, laundry, and a clothing closet. Case management services in regard to housing, employment, recovery, mental health care, medical treatment, and life goals may be available on a case-by-case basis. 145 NE Revere Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Adults aged 18 and older and families with minorchildren. Unaccompanied youth under 18 not eligible. Well-behaved pets allowed with owner supervision. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Meals 7 days per week: Breakfast 7am-8am; Lunch Noon-1pm; Dinner 6pm-7pm Shelter check-in 7 days per week: 5:30pm-10pm; assigned beds guaranteed only until 8pm Discussion/instruction hours: Monday-Friday 8am-11am Email (541) 388-2096 - 830-5 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES REDMOND LOW-BARRIER SHELTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides overnight shelter, community meals 3 times a day, showers, laundry, commercial kitchen, and an emergency clothing closet. Individual case management services for housing, employment, recovery, mental health care, medical treatment, and life goals are also available on a case-by-case basis. Residents can participate in faith based fellowship and discussion groups. Donations for clothing and household type items accepted. 1350 S Highway 97 Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Adults aged 18 and older and families with minorchildren. Unaccompanied youth under 18 not eligible. Well-behaved pets allowed with owner supervision. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Meals 7 days per week: Breakfast 7am-8am; Lunch Noon-1pm; Dinner 6pm-7pm Shelter check-in 7 days per week: 5:30pm-10pm; assigned beds guaranteed only until 8pm Discussion/instruction hours: Monday-Friday 8am-11am Email (541) 548-1772 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION WOMEN'S FACILITY DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of sweatpants, sweaters, jeans, T-shirts, thermals and underwear, socks, backpacks, batteries, hand warmers, juice, tents, tarps, sleeping bags, bed sheets, and pillowcases. Also accepts financial donations and $25 gift cards for guests. 1340 NE Logan Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 8am-5pm Email (503) 472-9766 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE JOIN JOIN DONATIONS KLAMATH FALLS FIRST UNITED METHODIST CHURCH FOOD PANTRY P:EAR P:EAR RIGHT 2 DREAM TOO DONATIONS ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE SEVERE WEATHER CLACKAMAS COUNTY DONATIONS SEVERE WEATHER CLATSOP COUNTY DONATIONS SEVERE WEATHER LANE COUNTY DONATIONS SEVERE WEATHER LANE COUNTY DONATIONS SEVERE WEATHER UMATILLA COUNTY DONATIONS SEVERE WEATHER UNION COUNTY DONATIONS SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES LOW-BARRIER SHELTER SERVICES SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES LOW-BARRIER SHELTER SERVICES YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION DONATIONS
